title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
author: openai-blog
raw_description: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.
summary: 三菱日联金融集团（MUFG）利用ChatGPT Enterprise构建AI原生组织，优化工作流程并规模化提供AI驱动的金融服务。
analysis_note: 有价值的AI商业化应用案例，但技术深度一般，主要展示企业级AI部署。
